content: After many years of trying, I finally discovered how to live forever. Just as I was celebrating, a mysterious figure appeared in front of me—it was Death! Death didn’t look scary at all; instead, he smiled and handed me a shiny business card. “When you realize living forever sucks,” Death said, “call this number—I’ve got a job offer for you.” I took the card, feeling curious but also a little nervous about what the job could be. Days passed, and I started noticing that living forever meant watching everyone I loved grow old and leave. Finally, I decided to call the number on the card, hoping for a new adventure. Death answered with a wink and said, “Welcome to your new job as my apprentice—helping others understand life and death.” It sounded like an important and exciting job, and I couldn’t wait to begin.
